    WHEN EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [Users] AS [u]
        WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [u].[Email] = @__request_Email_0) THEN CAST(1 AS bit)

END

FROM (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = @__isDeleted_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = @__isActive_Value_1
    ORDER BY [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[ParentId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c1] ON [t].[Id] = [c1].[ParentId]
ORDER BY [t].[DisplayOrder], [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [c0].[Id]
[2026-07-06 23:01:09.183 +05:30] [INF] [CorrelationId: ] Executed DbCommand (151ms) [Parameters=[@__p_0='?' (DbType = Int32)], CommandType='"Text"', CommandTimeout='30']
SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Barcode], [t].[BrandId], [t].[CategoryId], [t].[CostPrice], [t].[CreatedAtUtc], [t].[CreatedBy], [t].[DeletedAtUtc], [t].[DeletedBy], [t].[Description], [t].[DiscountEndDate], [t].[DiscountStartDate], [t].[DiscountType], [t].[DiscountValue], [t].[Height], [t].[IsActive], [t].[IsBestSeller], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[IsFeatured], [t].[IsNewArrival], [t].[IsPublished], [t].[Length], [t].[MaximumStock], [t].[MetaDescription], [t].[MetaKeywords], [t].[MetaTitle], [t].[MinimumStock], [t].[Name], [t].[Price], [t].[RowVersion], [t].[ShortDescription], [t].[Sku], [t].[Slug], [t].[StockQuantity], [t].[StockStatus], [t].[SubCategoryId], [t].[TaxPercentage], [t].[UpdatedAtUtc], [t].[UpdatedBy], [t].[Weight], [t].[Width], [t0].[Id], [t0].[BannerPublicId], [t0].[BannerUrl], [t0].[CreatedAtUtc], [t0].[CreatedBy], [t0].[DeletedAtUtc], [t0].[DeletedBy], [t0].[Description], [t0].[DisplayOrder], [t0].[ImagePublicId], [t0].[ImageUrl], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsFeatured], [t0].[MetaDescription], [t0].[MetaKeywords], [t0].[MetaTitle], [t0].[Name], [t0].[ParentId], [t0].[RowVersion], [t0].[ShortDescription], [t0].[Slug], [t0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [t0].[UpdatedBy], [t1].[Id], [t1].[CreatedAtUtc], [t1].[CreatedBy], [t1].[DeletedAtUtc], [t1].[DeletedBy], [t1].[DisplayOrder], [t1].[IsDeleted], [t1].[IsPrimary], [t1].[ProductId], [t1].[PublicId], [t1].[RowVersion], [t1].[UpdatedAtUtc], [t1].[UpdatedBy], [t1].[Url]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsPublished] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsFeatured] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]

    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[SubCategoryId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brands] AS [b] ON [t].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [ProductVariants] AS [p1] ON [t].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [c].[Id], [c0].[Id], [b].[Id], [p0].[Id]

INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[SubCategoryId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brands] AS [b] ON [t].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [ProductVariants] AS [p1] ON [t].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]

    ORDER BY [w].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]

) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[Id]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]

) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CategoryId] = [t1].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[Description], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[LogoUrl], [b].[Name], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[Slug], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]

) AS [t2] ON [t0].[BrandId] = [t2].[Id]

) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[ProductId]

    FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[ProductId]

SELECT [t].[Id], [t].[Channel], [t].[CreatedAtUtc], [t].[CreatedBy], [t].[DeletedAtUtc], [t].[DeletedBy], [t].[IsDeleted], [t].[IsRead], [t].[Message], [t].[NotificationType], [t].[Priority], [t].[RelatedEntity], [t].[RelatedEntityId], [t].[RowVersion], [t].[SentTime], [t].[Status], [t].[Title], [t].[UpdatedAtUtc], [t].[UpdatedBy], [t].[UserId], [t0].[Id], [t0].[CreatedAtUtc], [t0].[CreatedBy], [t0].[DeletedAtUtc], [t0].[DeletedBy], [t0].[Email], [t0].[EmailVerificationOtpExpiresAtUtc], [t0].[EmailVerificationOtpHash], [t0].[EmailVerificationOtpRetryCount], [t0].[ForcePasswordChange], [t0].[FullName], [t0].[IsActive], [t0].[IsDeleted], [t0].[IsEmailVerified], [t0].[IsLocked], [t0].[LastLoginUtc], [t0].[LockoutEndUtc], [t0].[LoginCount], [t0].[MobileNumber], [t0].[MobileVerified], [t0].[PasswordHash], [t0].[PasswordResetOtpExpiresAtUtc], [t0].[PasswordResetOtpHash], [t0].[Role], [t0].[RowVersion], [t0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [t0].[UpdatedBy]
FROM (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[Channel], [n].[CreatedAtUtc], [n].[CreatedBy], [n].[DeletedAtUtc], [n].[DeletedBy], [n].[IsDeleted], [n].[IsRead], [n].[Message], [n].[NotificationType], [n].[Priority], [n].[RelatedEntity], [n].[RelatedEntityId], [n].[RowVersion], [n].[SentTime], [n].[Status], [n].[Title], [n].[UpdatedAtUtc], [n].[UpdatedBy], [n].[UserId], COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) AS [c]
    FROM [Notifications] AS [n]
    WHERE [n].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [n].[Channel] = @__channel_0
    ORDER BY COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAtUtc], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[DeletedAtUtc], [u].[DeletedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpExpiresAtUtc], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpHash], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpRetryCount], [u].[ForcePasswordChange], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[IsEmailVerified], [u].[IsLocked], [u].[LastLoginUtc], [u].[LockoutEndUtc], [u].[LoginCount], [u].[MobileNumber], [u].[MobileVerified], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PasswordResetOtpExpiresAtUtc], [u].[PasswordResetOtpHash], [u].[Role], [u].[RowVersion], [u].[UpdatedAtUtc], [u].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[UserId] = [t0].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[c] DESC

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_0 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_1 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[SubCategoryId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brands] AS [b] ON [t].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [ProductVariants] AS [p1] ON [t].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [c].[Id], [c0].[Id], [b].[Id], [p0].[Id]

    SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[CreatedAtUtc], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[DeletedAtUtc], [w].[DeletedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[ProductId], [w].[RowVersion], [w].[UpdatedAtUtc], [w].[UpdatedBy], [w].[UserId]
    FROM [WishlistItems] AS [w]
    WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [w].[UserId] = @__userId_0
    ORDER BY [w].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CategoryId] = [t1].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[Description], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[LogoUrl], [b].[Name], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[Slug], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Brands] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[BrandId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[AdminNotes], [r].[CreatedAtUtc], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[DeletedAtUtc], [r].[DeletedBy], [r].[HelpfulCount], [r].[IsApproved], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsRecommended], [r].[IsReported], [r].[OrderId], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[ReportReason], [r].[ReviewDescription], [r].[ReviewTitle], [r].[RowVersion], [r].[Status], [r].[UpdatedAtUtc], [r].[UpdatedBy], [r].[UserId]
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id]

    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[Channel], [n].[CreatedAtUtc], [n].[CreatedBy], [n].[DeletedAtUtc], [n].[DeletedBy], [n].[IsDeleted], [n].[IsRead], [n].[Message], [n].[NotificationType], [n].[Priority], [n].[RelatedEntity], [n].[RelatedEntityId], [n].[RowVersion], [n].[SentTime], [n].[Status], [n].[Title], [n].[UpdatedAtUtc], [n].[UpdatedBy], [n].[UserId], COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) AS [c]

    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[UserId] = [t0].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[c] DESC

FROM (

) AS [t]

    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]

    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CategoryId] = [t1].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[Description], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[LogoUrl], [b].[Name], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[Slug], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Brands] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[BrandId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]

    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsPublished] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsNewArrival] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (

    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[ProductId] = [t0].[Id]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CategoryId] = [t1].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [b].[Id], [b].[CreatedAtUtc], [b].[CreatedBy], [b].[DeletedAtUtc], [b].[DeletedBy], [b].[Description], [b].[IsDeleted], [b].[LogoUrl], [b].[Name], [b].[RowVersion], [b].[Slug], [b].[UpdatedAtUtc], [b].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Brands] AS [b]
    WHERE [b].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t2] ON [t0].[BrandId] = [t2].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t3] ON [t0].[Id] = [t3].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [r].[Id], [r].[AdminNotes], [r].[CreatedAtUtc], [r].[CreatedBy], [r].[DeletedAtUtc], [r].[DeletedBy], [r].[HelpfulCount], [r].[IsApproved], [r].[IsDeleted], [r].[IsRecommended], [r].[IsReported], [r].[OrderId], [r].[ProductId], [r].[Rating], [r].[ReportReason], [r].[ReviewDescription], [r].[ReviewTitle], [r].[RowVersion], [r].[Status], [r].[UpdatedAtUtc], [r].[UpdatedBy], [r].[UserId]
    FROM [Reviews] AS [r]
    WHERE [r].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t0].[Id] = [t4].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [t0].[Id], [t1].[Id], [t2].[Id], [t3].[Id]

    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[Channel], [n].[CreatedAtUtc], [n].[CreatedBy], [n].[DeletedAtUtc], [n].[DeletedBy], [n].[IsDeleted], [n].[IsRead], [n].[Message], [n].[NotificationType], [n].[Priority], [n].[RelatedEntity], [n].[RelatedEntityId], [n].[RowVersion], [n].[SentTime], [n].[Status], [n].[Title], [n].[UpdatedAtUtc], [n].[UpdatedBy], [n].[UserId], COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) AS [c]

    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsPublished] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsBestSeller] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC

    SELECT TOP(@__p_0) [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[IsActive] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsPublished] = CAST(1 AS bit) AND [p].[IsFeatured] = CAST(1 AS bit)
    ORDER BY [p].[Name]
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [n].[Id], [n].[Channel], [n].[CreatedAtUtc], [n].[CreatedBy], [n].[DeletedAtUtc], [n].[DeletedBy], [n].[IsDeleted], [n].[IsRead], [n].[Message], [n].[NotificationType], [n].[Priority], [n].[RelatedEntity], [n].[RelatedEntityId], [n].[RowVersion], [n].[SentTime], [n].[Status], [n].[Title], [n].[UpdatedAtUtc], [n].[UpdatedBy], [n].[UserId], COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) AS [c]
    FROM [Notifications] AS [n]
    WHERE [n].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [n].[Channel] = @__channel_0
    ORDER BY COALESCE([n].[SentTime], [n].[CreatedAtUtc]) DESC
    OFFSET @__p_1 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_2 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]

    SELECT [u].[Id], [u].[CreatedAtUtc], [u].[CreatedBy], [u].[DeletedAtUtc], [u].[DeletedBy], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpExpiresAtUtc], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpHash], [u].[EmailVerificationOtpRetryCount], [u].[ForcePasswordChange], [u].[FullName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsDeleted], [u].[IsEmailVerified], [u].[IsLocked], [u].[LastLoginUtc], [u].[LockoutEndUtc], [u].[LoginCount], [u].[MobileNumber], [u].[MobileVerified], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PasswordResetOtpExpiresAtUtc], [u].[PasswordResetOtpHash], [u].[Role], [u].[RowVersion], [u].[UpdatedAtUtc], [u].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Users] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[UserId] = [t0].[Id]
ORDER BY [t].[c] DESC

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t0] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [t0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p0].[Id], [p0].[CreatedAtUtc], [p0].[CreatedBy], [p0].[DeletedAtUtc], [p0].[DeletedBy], [p0].[DisplayOrder], [p0].[IsDeleted], [p0].[IsPrimary], [p0].[ProductId], [p0].[PublicId], [p0].[RowVersion], [p0].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p0].[UpdatedBy], [p0].[Url]
    FROM [ProductImages] AS [p0]
    WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t1] ON [t].[Id] = [t1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [t0].[Id]

    SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[BannerPublicId], [c].[BannerUrl], [c].[CreatedAtUtc], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[DeletedAtUtc], [c].[DeletedBy], [c].[Description], [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[ImagePublicId], [c].[ImageUrl], [c].[IsActive], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[IsFeatured], [c].[MetaDescription], [c].[MetaKeywords], [c].[MetaTitle], [c].[Name], [c].[ParentId], [c].[RowVersion], [c].[ShortDescription], [c].[Slug], [c].[UpdatedAtUtc], [c].[UpdatedBy]
    FROM [Categories] AS [c]
    WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = @__isDeleted_Value_0 AND [c].[IsActive] = @__isActive_Value_1
    ORDER BY [c].[DisplayOrder], [c].[Name]
    OFFSET @__p_2 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_3 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[ParentId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c1] ON [t].[Id] = [c1].[ParentId]
ORDER BY [t].[DisplayOrder], [t].[Name], [t].[Id], [c0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = @__isDeleted_Value_0 AND [p].[IsActive] = @__isActive_Value_1 AND [p].[IsPublished] = @__isPublished_Value_2
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[SubCategoryId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brands] AS [b] ON [t].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [ProductVariants] AS [p1] ON [t].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [c].[Id], [c0].[Id], [b].[Id], [p0].[Id]

FROM (
    SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[Barcode], [p].[BrandId], [p].[CategoryId], [p].[CostPrice], [p].[CreatedAtUtc], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[DeletedAtUtc], [p].[DeletedBy], [p].[Description], [p].[DiscountEndDate], [p].[DiscountStartDate], [p].[DiscountType], [p].[DiscountValue], [p].[Height], [p].[IsActive], [p].[IsBestSeller], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[IsFeatured], [p].[IsNewArrival], [p].[IsPublished], [p].[Length], [p].[MaximumStock], [p].[MetaDescription], [p].[MetaKeywords], [p].[MetaTitle], [p].[MinimumStock], [p].[Name], [p].[Price], [p].[RowVersion], [p].[ShortDescription], [p].[Sku], [p].[Slug], [p].[StockQuantity], [p].[StockStatus], [p].[SubCategoryId], [p].[TaxPercentage], [p].[UpdatedAtUtc], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[Weight], [p].[Width]
    FROM [Products] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = @__isDeleted_Value_0 AND [p].[IsActive] = @__isActive_Value_1 AND [p].[IsPublished] = @__isPublished_Value_2
    ORDER BY [p].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC
    OFFSET @__p_3 ROWS FETCH NEXT @__p_4 ROWS ONLY
) AS [t]
INNER JOIN [Categories] AS [c] ON [t].[CategoryId] = [c].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Categories] AS [c0] ON [t].[SubCategoryId] = [c0].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [Brands] AS [b] ON [t].[BrandId] = [b].[Id]
LEFT JOIN [ProductImages] AS [p0] ON [t].[Id] = [p0].[ProductId]
LEFT JOIN [ProductVariants] AS [p1] ON [t].[Id] = [p1].[ProductId]
ORDER BY [t].[CreatedAtUtc] DESC, [t].[Id], [c].[Id], [c0].[Id], [b].[Id], [p0].[Id]
